name: WPP plc
description: WPP plc is a British multinational creative transformation company that provides a comprehensive range of services, including communications, advertising, public relations, technology, and commerce. Headquartered in London, the company acts as a trusted growth partner for many of the world’s leading brands. WPP operates globally, helping clients navigate the complexities of the modern marketing landscape by integrating data, creativity, and technology to deliver impactful results. The company is committed to sustainable business practices, aiming to drive long-term value for its clients, employees, and partners through innovative, world-class ideas and strategic brand development.
